title: Setting monthly salary for employee/user
excerpt: Hi, does http://monday.com monday.com software allow to asign a monthly salary to an user? If so, can You also see the history of rises in his carrier?

posts.author: Bartek (Bartek)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, does http://monday.com monday.com software allow to asign a monthly salary to an user? If so, can You also see the history of rises in his carrier?

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Bartek

I’d love to know a little more about the workflow you’re looking to achieve here!

Are you looking to track an employees salary each month to then report on this later?
If so, you might like to check out The Numbers Column for this.
You can then create a new column for each month and add in the salary for each month.

If you’re looking to have this salary automatically populate on your board, it would be great to know the logic you’d like to have behind this, so that we can make some more customised suggestions here!

Best,
Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Bartek!

Just wanted to follow up and see if you needed any additional assistance here?

If not, and the previous reply was helpful, it would be great if you could mark it as the solution.
This hugely helps other users who might be searching for the same thing!

Best,

Dani
